channel.title: Just a Test
channel.description: Recent content on Just a Test

item.title: Going from vim to vim inside emacs
item.description: Well. If you been around internet any amount of time you might know about one of the oldest holywars: vim v. emacs. Personally I’ve been in vim camp for the past 6 years, and I loved it. Vim was my everyday tool, mostly for quick’n’dirty scripts to process experimental data or plot something, and for my LaTeX writing. Vim is ubiquitous: almost every box you ssh to has vim or at least some version of vi.

item.title: Init
item.description: Well, I guess it’s live, folks.

item.title: $ whoami
item.description: Grigory Shipunov All my contacts are on keybase Chemistry. Physics. Tasty and unhealthy food. PhD student at IFW-Dresden, Crystal growth group. Masters from Inorganic Chemistry Division, Chemistry Department, Lomonosov Moscow State University. Computer-tinkerer.
